commands.title: Build B-Material apk release
commands.commands:
cd D:\Desktop\AndroidProjects\B-Material
gradlew clean assembleRelease
explorer app\build\outputs\apk\release

commands.title: Install AAECarMedia apk
commands.commands:
# Khối lệnh này hiện tại chạy có thể chưa thành công!
adb root
powershell -NoProfile -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds 2"

adb remount
powershell -NoProfile -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds 2"

adb disable-verity

adb reboot
adb wait-for-device



adb shell rm -f /system/priv-app/AAECarMediaApp/AAECarMediaApp.apk

adb push "D:/Downloads/AAECarMediaApp.apk" /system/priv-app/AAECarMediaApp/AAECarMediaApp.apk

adb shell chmod 755 /system/priv-app/AAECarMediaApp
adb shell chmod 644 /system/priv-app/AAECarMediaApp/AAECarMediaApp.apk

adb reboot
adb wait-for-device

adb root
powershell -NoProfile -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds 2"

adb remount
powershell -NoProfile -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds 2"

adb shell chmod 755 /system/priv-app/AAECarMediaApp
adb shell chmod 644 /system/priv-app/AAECarMediaApp/AAECarMediaApp.apk

commands.title: Android Fast dump report
Build and install apk
commands.commands:
@echo off
setlocal EnableExtensions EnableDelayedExpansion

REM ============================================================
REM Config
REM ============================================================
set "PROJECT_DIR=D:\Desktop\AndroidProjects"
set "DEVICE_IP=192.168.32.117"
set "DEVICE_SERIAL=%DEVICE_IP%:5555"

set "APK_NAME=MediaApp.apk"
set "LOCAL_APK=%PROJECT_DIR%\app\build\outputs\apk\release\app-release.apk"
set "COPY_APK=D:\Downloads\%APK_NAME%"

set "REMOTE_DIR=/system/priv-app/MediaApp"
set "REMOTE_APK=%REMOTE_DIR%/%APK_NAME%"

REM Nếu device của bạn dùng port khác 5555, sửa DEVICE_SERIAL ở trên.
REM Ví dụ: set "DEVICE_SERIAL=192.168.32.117:5555"

echo.
echo ============================================================
echo [1/8] Build release APK
echo ============================================================

cd /d "%PROJECT_DIR%"
if errorlevel 1 (
    echo [ERROR] Cannot cd to project dir: "%PROJECT_DIR%"
    exit /b 1
)

call gradlew.bat clean assembleRelease
if errorlevel 1 (
    echo [ERROR] Gradle build failed.
    exit /b 1
)

if not exist "%LOCAL_APK%" (
    echo [ERROR] APK not found:
    echo "%LOCAL_APK%"
    exit /b 1
)

echo.
echo ============================================================
echo [2/8] Copy APK to Downloads
echo ============================================================

copy /Y "%LOCAL_APK%" "%COPY_APK%"
if errorlevel 1 (
    echo [ERROR] Cannot copy APK to:
    echo "%COPY_APK%"
    exit /b 1
)

echo APK copied to:
echo "%COPY_APK%"

echo.
echo ============================================================
echo [3/8] Connect to device
echo ============================================================

call :connect_device
if errorlevel 1 exit /b 1

echo.
echo ============================================================
echo [4/8] Root and remount
echo ============================================================

call :adb_cmd root
call :sleep 2

call :connect_device
if errorlevel 1 exit /b 1

call :adb_cmd remount
if errorlevel 1 (
    echo [ERROR] adb remount failed.
    exit /b 1
)
call :sleep 2

echo.
echo ============================================================
echo [5/8] Remove old APK
echo ============================================================

call :adb_cmd shell rm -f "%REMOTE_APK%"
if errorlevel 1 (
    echo [ERROR] Failed to remove old APK.
    exit /b 1
)

echo.
echo ============================================================
echo [6/8] Reboot after removing old APK
echo ============================================================

call :adb_cmd reboot

call :wait_device_reconnect
if errorlevel 1 exit /b 1

echo.
echo ============================================================
echo [7/8] Root/remount again and push new APK
echo ============================================================

call :adb_cmd root
call :sleep 2

call :connect_device
if errorlevel 1 exit /b 1

call :adb_cmd remount
if errorlevel 1 (
    echo [ERROR] adb remount failed after reboot.
    exit /b 1
)
call :sleep 2

call :adb_cmd shell mkdir -p "%REMOTE_DIR%"

call :adb_cmd push "%COPY_APK%" "%REMOTE_APK%"
if errorlevel 1 (
    echo [ERROR] Failed to push APK.
    exit /b 1
)

call :adb_cmd shell chmod 755 "%REMOTE_DIR%"
call :adb_cmd shell chmod 644 "%REMOTE_APK%"

echo.
echo ============================================================
echo [8/8] Final reboot
echo ============================================================

call :adb_cmd reboot

call :wait_device_reconnect
if errorlevel 1 exit /b 1

echo.
echo ============================================================
echo DONE
echo APK deployed successfully to %DEVICE_SERIAL%
echo Remote path: %REMOTE_APK%
echo ============================================================

exit /b 0


REM ============================================================
REM Functions
REM ============================================================

:adb_cmd
adb -s "%DEVICE_SERIAL%" %*
exit /b %errorlevel%


:connect_device
echo [connect] adb connect %DEVICE_SERIAL%
adb connect "%DEVICE_SERIAL%"

REM adb connect có thể trả text nhưng errorlevel không phải lúc nào cũng đủ tin cậy,
REM nên kiểm tra bằng adb devices.
call :wait_until_device_listed 60
exit /b %errorlevel%


:wait_device_reconnect
echo.
echo [wait] Waiting for device to disconnect/reboot...
call :sleep 5

echo [wait] Reconnecting to %DEVICE_SERIAL% ...
call :wait_until_device_listed 120
if errorlevel 1 (
    echo [ERROR] Device did not reconnect after reboot.
    exit /b 1
)

echo [wait] adb wait-for-device...
adb -s "%DEVICE_SERIAL%" wait-for-device
if errorlevel 1 (
    echo [ERROR] adb wait-for-device failed.
    exit /b 1
)

echo [wait] Device is online.
exit /b 0


:wait_until_device_listed
set "TIMEOUT_SECONDS=%~1"
set /a COUNT=0

:wait_loop
adb connect "%DEVICE_SERIAL%" >nul 2>&1

for /f "tokens=1,2" %%A in ('adb devices ^| findstr /R /C:"%DEVICE_SERIAL%[	 ]*device"') do (
    echo [ok] Device connected: %%A %%B
    exit /b 0
)

set /a COUNT+=1
if !COUNT! GEQ %TIMEOUT_SECONDS% (
    echo [ERROR] Timeout waiting for device: %DEVICE_SERIAL%
    echo.
    echo Current adb devices:
    adb devices
    exit /b 1
)

echo [wait] Device not ready yet... !COUNT!/%TIMEOUT_SECONDS%
call :sleep 1
goto wait_loop


:sleep
powershell -NoProfile -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds %~1"
exit /b 0

commands.title: sf
commands.commands:
@echo off
chcp 65001 > nul
setlocal EnableExtensions EnableDelayedExpansion

REM =========================================================
REM CONFIG
REM =========================================================
set "TARGET_IP=10.134.197.128"
set "TARGET_PORT=5555"
set "DEVICE=%TARGET_IP%:%TARGET_PORT%"

set "CONNECT_TIMEOUT=60"
set "BOOT_TIMEOUT=180"

set "APK_PATH=C:\Users\phong.pham\Project\media\out\gradle-build\media-app\outputs\apk\Sample.apk"

set "REMOTE_DIR=/system/app"
set "REMOTE_APK=%REMOTE_DIR%/Sample.apk"

REM =========================================================
REM CHECK APK EXISTS
REM =========================================================
echo ===== CHECK APK FILE =====

if not exist "%APK_PATH%" (
    echo [ERROR] Không tìm thấy APK:
    echo %APK_PATH%
    echo.
    echo Vui lòng kiểm tra lại đường dẫn APK_PATH trong script.
    goto :failed
)

echo [OK] APK tồn tại:
echo %APK_PATH%

REM =========================================================
REM CONNECT DEVICE
REM =========================================================
echo.
echo ===== CONNECT TARGET DEVICE =====

call :ensureDeviceConnected
if errorlevel 1 goto :device_failed

REM =========================================================
REM ADB PUSH APK
REM =========================================================
echo.
echo ===== PREPARE DEVICE =====

call :adbRootAndReconnect
if errorlevel 1 goto :failed

call :runAdb remount
if errorlevel 1 goto :failed

call :runAdb disable-verity
if errorlevel 1 goto :failed

REM disable-verity thường cần reboot để có hiệu lực.
call :rebootAndReconnect
if errorlevel 1 goto :device_failed

call :adbRootAndReconnect
if errorlevel 1 goto :failed

call :runAdb remount
if errorlevel 1 goto :failed

echo.
echo ===== REMOVE OLD APK =====

call :runAdb shell rm -f "%REMOTE_APK%"
if errorlevel 1 goto :failed

REM Giữ lại logic reboot sau khi xóa APK như script build + push trước đó.
call :rebootAndReconnect
if errorlevel 1 goto :device_failed

call :adbRootAndReconnect
if errorlevel 1 goto :failed

call :runAdb remount
if errorlevel 1 goto :failed

echo.
echo ===== PUSH NEW APK =====

call :runAdb push "%APK_PATH%" "%REMOTE_APK%"
if errorlevel 1 goto :failed

echo.
echo ===== FIX PERMISSION =====

call :runAdb shell chmod 755 "%REMOTE_DIR%"
if errorlevel 1 goto :failed

call :runAdb shell chmod 644 "%REMOTE_APK%"
if errorlevel 1 goto :failed

echo.
echo ===== FINAL REBOOT =====

call :rebootAndReconnect
if errorlevel 1 goto :device_failed

echo.
echo [OK] DONE! Push APK vào device %DEVICE% thành công.
pause
exit /b 0

REM =========================================================
REM FUNCTIONS
REM =========================================================

:ensureDeviceConnected
echo [ADB] Đang đảm bảo connect tới %DEVICE% ...

REM Chỉ disconnect đúng target này, không disconnect toàn bộ device khác.
adb disconnect "%DEVICE%" > nul 2>&1

set /a elapsed=0

:connect_loop
set "state="

adb connect "%DEVICE%" > nul 2>&1

for /f "tokens=* delims=" %%S in ('adb -s "%DEVICE%" get-state 2^>nul') do (
    set "state=%%S"
)

if /i "!state!"=="device" (
    echo [ADB] Connected: %DEVICE%
    exit /b 0
)

if !elapsed! GEQ %CONNECT_TIMEOUT% (
    echo [ERROR] Không connect được device %DEVICE% sau %CONNECT_TIMEOUT%s.
    exit /b 1
)

set /a elapsed+=1
timeout /t 1 /nobreak > nul
goto :connect_loop


:waitBootCompleted
echo [ADB] Đang chờ Android boot completed ...

set /a bootElapsed=0

:boot_loop
set "bootCompleted="

for /f "tokens=* delims=" %%B in ('adb -s "%DEVICE%" shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2^>nul') do (
    set "bootCompleted=%%B"
)

if "!bootCompleted!"=="1" (
    echo [ADB] Boot completed.
    exit /b 0
)

if !bootElapsed! GEQ %BOOT_TIMEOUT% (
    echo [ERROR] Device đã connect nhưng Android chưa boot xong sau %BOOT_TIMEOUT%s.
    exit /b 1
)

set /a bootElapsed+=1
timeout /t 1 /nobreak > nul
goto :boot_loop


:adbRootAndReconnect
call :ensureDeviceConnected
if errorlevel 1 exit /b 1

call :runAdb root
if errorlevel 1 exit /b 1

REM adb root có thể restart adbd, nên cần connect lại đúng target.
call :ensureDeviceConnected
if errorlevel 1 exit /b 1

exit /b 0


:rebootAndReconnect
call :ensureDeviceConnected
if errorlevel 1 exit /b 1

call :runAdb reboot
if errorlevel 1 exit /b 1

echo [ADB] Device đang reboot, chờ reconnect tối đa %CONNECT_TIMEOUT%s ...

call :ensureDeviceConnected
if errorlevel 1 exit /b 1

call :waitBootCompleted
if errorlevel 1 exit /b 1

exit /b 0


:runAdb
echo [ADB] adb -s %DEVICE% %*
adb -s "%DEVICE%" %*
if errorlevel 1 (
    echo [ERROR] Lệnh thất bại:
    echo adb -s %DEVICE% %*
    exit /b 1
)
exit /b 0


:device_failed
echo.
echo [ERROR] Không connect được device %DEVICE%.
echo [ERROR] Dừng chương trình để tránh chạy lệnh ADB sai target.
pause
exit /b 1


:failed
echo.
echo [ERROR] Script thất bại. Vui lòng kiểm tra log phía trên.
pause
exit /b 1
